message.content:
@startuml
left to right direction
actor "Utilisateur" as U
participant "Esidom front-end" as FE
participant "Esidom back-end" as BE
participant "Home Assistant" as HA

U -> FE : Lister les routines
FE -> BE : GET /automations
BE -> HA : WS: {type: "get_states"}
HA --> BE : WS: {type: "result", success: true, result: []}
BE --> FE : 200 - Ok
FE --> U : Les routines sont listées

note right of U
  Utilisateur
end note

note left of FE
  Esidom front-end
end note

note left of BE
  Esidom back-end
end note

note right of HA
  Home Assistant
end note

note left of U
  Utilisateur
end note

note left of FE
  Esidom front-end
end note

note left of BE
  Esidom back-end
end note

note right of HA
  Home Assistant
end note

@enduml
